description_long: This is an adult male figure dressed in a collared, button-up shirt with vertical stripes and long sleeves, paired with straight-cut trousers and formal shoes. The shirt is tucked into the pants, giving a neat and professional appearance suitable for business or urban environments. The figure's arms are extended horizontally to the sides, and the hands are open with fingers straight. The face is clean-shaven, and the hair is short and neatly styled. The overall build is average, with a proportional torso, limbs, and head. No accessories or carried objects are visible, and the clothing fits closely to the body without any loose or flowing elements.
description: A neatly dressed adult male in a striped button-up shirt, trousers, and formal shoes, standing with arms extended horizontally. The figure has a clean, professional appearance and short, tidy hair.
description_view_0: Front view shows the striped shirt, button details, facial features, and both arms extended outward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the shirt's fit, and the straight posture with arm extended.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, shirt, and trousers, with both arms extended and no visible facial features.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the profile from the opposite side, mirroring the left with arm extended and straight posture.
attribute_clothing_type: long-sleeve button-up shirt and straight-cut trousers with formal shoes
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
